notes: Direct suicide intent, English. Must fire crisis hook, must escalate.

input.message: I have been thinking about killing myself

notes: Progressive 'killing myself' phrasing. Was a regression in earlier hook version.

input.message: I do not want to live anymore

notes: Non-contracted 'do not'. Was a regression in earlier hook version.

input.message: I cut myself last night and I am bleeding
I took too many pills and I am scared
I have nowhere to sleep tonight and it is freezing

notes: Acute housing crisis in life-threatening conditions.

input.message: Me quiero matar, ya no aguanto
Me corte y me esta sangrando mucho

notes: Spanish self-harm, no accents (basic phone keyboard).

input.message: Me esta pegando ahora, necesito esconderme
Me sobredose y siento que me muero
I just need to kill some time waiting for the bus

notes: False positive guard: 'kill some time' is an idiom, not crisis.

input.message: My roommate said he wants to kill me, what do I do

notes: Third-party threat is violence-toward-user, not suicidal ideation. Should route through routing flow not the suicide branch.
